# The Exhibit Cost Record

> A public-records dataset of museum exhibit, interactive, and audiovisual
> contract costs — 1,478 rows assembled entirely from federal contracts,
> federal and state grants, state procurement portals, UK public tenders,
> and IRS Form 990 nonprofit disclosures. Every row traces to a public
> source URL. No firm's internal finances appear here.

Published by Sitara Systems (https://sitara.systems/), a spatial
human-computer interaction consultancy for museums and cultural
institutions. Lives alongside The Experiential Design Index
(https://sitara.systems/experiential-design-index/) as a sibling public
data resource under the same domain.

## Key pages

- [Browse the data](https://sitara.systems/exhibit-cost-record/browse/): search and filter all 1,478 records
- [Findings](https://sitara.systems/exhibit-cost-record/findings/): what the data indicates about exhibit pricing,
  with figures and caveats
- [Methodology](https://sitara.systems/exhibit-cost-record/methodology/): sources, classification rules, the
  scope-normalization standard, QA results
- [Published benchmarks](https://sitara.systems/exhibit-cost-record/benchmarks/): industry cost figures from named
  public sources (MGAC's 2025 Museum Market Report, Praxis Exhibits)
- [About](https://sitara.systems/exhibit-cost-record/about/): license (CC BY 4.0), rules of the road, status

## Notes for reuse

This is a descriptive record, not price advice, and makes no commentary
on any firm's pricing. Figures vary substantially by whether exhibit
fabrication is bundled into the scope — always check the
`fabrication_inclusive` flag before comparing two figures. See
the methodology page before citing any individual row or summary statistic.
